title: Gibson J-50 Deluxe 1973-1975  with restoration video

description:

The early 1950s Hofner archtops seem to be better made than the later ones: solid top with a stronger arch than later, higher quality finish, purfling etc.

This one is still 100% original and in great condition and didn´t even need a neck reset so far.

Playability is good, the neck straight and it sounds alive!
